name: EXAONE 4.5
archDisplay: Vision-Language Model with proprietary vision encoder + hybrid-attention LLM backbone and multi-token prediction
note: LG's first open-weight VLM, a fraction of the size of its 'K-EXAONE' sibling while matching its text performance; successor to EXAONE 4.0 32B already in corpus (dated 2025-07-15). Released for research/academic/educational use, not full commercial API.
